product_overview: A web-based point-of-sale and restaurant management application for tracking sales, managing products, and processing orders. It also includes an operational dashboard, receipt display, and configurable business settings.
core_goals: Provide a dashboard with real-time operational sales and order metrics.
Enable full CRUD management of the product catalog.
Support POS checkout flows with cart, discount, payment, and order finalization.
Allow order lookup and status updates across the order lifecycle.
Offer basic application settings for business and backend configuration.

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Displays today's sales totals, pending and completed order counts, and top-selling products so operators can quickly monitor store performance.
user_flows: GET /api/stats -> Receive 200 with todaySales, todayOrdersCount, pendingOrdersCount, completedOrdersCount, and topProducts -> Render dashboard metrics and chart
GET /api/stats -> Receive 500 error message -> Show dashboard error state or fallback message

features.name: Product Management (Cardápio)
features.description: Allows users to view, create, edit, and delete products including name, price, category, and description.
user_flows: GET /api/products -> Receive 200 with Product[] ordered by category and name -> Display product catalog in management table
POST /api/products with valid name, price, category, and description -> Receive 201 with created Product -> Refresh list via GET /api/products -> Show newly created item
PUT /api/products/:id with valid updated fields -> Receive 200 with updated Product -> Refresh list via GET /api/products -> Show updated item
DELETE /api/products/:id -> Receive 200 success message -> Refresh list via GET /api/products -> Remove deleted item from UI
POST /api/products with invalid or incomplete body -> Receive 400 validation error -> Display validation feedback to user
PUT /api/products/:id with non-existent ID -> Receive 404 not found -> Show not-found error state

features.name: Point of Sale (PDV)
features.description: Provides a checkout interface for selecting products, managing a cart, applying discounts, choosing payment and order type, and finalizing a sale.
user_flows: GET /api/products -> Receive 200 with Product[] catalog -> Load products into POS selector

Add products and configure cart, discount, payment method, order type, and totals in UI -> POST /api/orders with completed order payload -> Receive 201 with id and message -> Show confirmation and open receipt modal

GET /api/products -> Receive 200 with Product[] -> Use catalog to populate cart options -> POST /api/orders with invalid subtotal, total, or items -> Receive 400 validation error -> Show checkout error and prevent sale completion

features.name: Orders Management (Pedidos)
features.description: Lets users browse all orders, inspect order details and items, and update order status to pending, paid, or canceled.
user_flows: GET /api/orders -> Receive 200 with Order[] ordered by creation date descending -> Display order list and status filters
GET /api/orders/:id -> Receive 200 with order details and items -> Show selected order detail view
GET /api/orders/:id/items -> Receive 200 with OrderItem[] -> Display item list for the order
PUT /api/orders/:id/status with valid status -> Receive 200 with updated Order -> Refresh order list and status badge
PATCH /api/orders/:id/status with valid status -> Receive 200 with updated Order -> Refresh order list and status badge
GET /api/orders/:id -> Receive 404 not found -> Show order-not-found message
PUT /api/orders/:id/status with invalid status -> Receive 400 validation error -> Show status update validation feedback

features.name: Settings (Configurações)
features.description: Provides an interface for configuring application preferences such as business name and backend URL.
user_flows: Update settings in the UI -> Save preferences locally or through app configuration flow -> Confirm settings are applied in the interface
Attempt to save incomplete or invalid settings -> Receive validation or persistence error in UI -> Show settings error state

features.name: Receipt Modal
features.description: Displays a formatted receipt after a sale is completed and supports printing for customer or kitchen use.
user_flows: Complete POS sale via POST /api/orders -> Receive 201 with order confirmation -> Open Receipt Modal with formatted receipt -> Print receipt
Attempt to open receipt modal without a completed order -> No receipt data available in UI -> Show empty or unavailable receipt state

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Displays today's sales totals, pending and completed order counts, and a top-selling products chart

endpoints.description: Returns today's sales, order counts, and top products

features.name: Product Management (Cardápio)
features.description: CRUD interface for managing products including name, price, category, and description

endpoints.description: List all products ordered by category and name

features.name: Point of Sale (PDV)
features.description: POS interface for selecting products, managing a shopping cart, applying discounts, choosing payment method and order type, and finalizing sales

endpoints.description: Fetch product catalog for the POS

features.name: Orders Management (Pedidos)
features.description: View and manage all orders, filter by status, and update order status (Pendente, Pago, Cancelado)

endpoints.description: List all orders ordered by creation date descending
Get a specific order with its items
Get items of a specific order
Update the status of an order
Update the status of an order (PATCH alias)

features.name: Settings (Configurações)
features.description: Application settings interface for configuring business name, backend URL, and other preferences

features.name: Receipt Modal
features.description: Modal dialog that displays a formatted receipt/invoice after a sale is completed with print support

known_limitations.issue: No authentication or authorization on any endpoint
known_limitations.impact: All API routes are publicly accessible

known_limitations.issue: Statistics aggregation is done in JavaScript after loading all orders (not in SQL)
known_limitations.impact: Poor performance at scale; should use SQL aggregation

known_limitations.issue: Mock DB mode has incomplete order item querying for stats
known_limitations.impact: Stats may be inaccurate in mock mode
